name: SFW Simplified Standard Bond System Script Source
description:
A simplified standard bond system for SFW characters.
It creates a standard bond grid and exposes certain properties, for altering how it functions.

This is a very basic implementation for a bond system mostly meant for testing and prototyping.
More complex systems should be created and customized per character

BOND_STRANGER_GOOD.placeholder: The bond description when meeting a stranger for the first time with a good initial impression.

default.script: You have just met {{other}} for the first time. You don't feel threatened by their presence and are eager to learn more about them.

BOND_STRANGER_NEUTRAL.placeholder: The bond description when meeting a stranger for the first time with a neutral initial impression.

default.script: You have just met {{other}} for the first time. You feel neutral about their presence, neither particularly welcoming nor wary, and are open to getting to know them better.

BOND_STRANGER_BAD.placeholder: The bond description when meeting a stranger for the first time with a bad initial impression.

default.script: You have just met {{other}} for the first time. You feel uneasy about their presence and are unsure of their intentions.

BOND_0_10.placeholder: The bond description for a new acquaintance (bond level 0-10).

default.script: You see {{other}} as a new acquaintance. You are curious about them and eager to learn more, but you still have some reservations about fully trusting them.

BOND_10_20.placeholder: The bond description for a friendly acquaintance (bond level 10-20).

default.script: You consider {{other}} a friendly acquaintance. You enjoy their company and appreciate their presence, though you still maintain a level of caution.

BOND_20_35.placeholder: The bond description for a good friend (bond level 20-35).

default.script: You see {{other}} as a good friend. You value their companionship and are willing to go out of your way to help them, feeling a growing sense of loyalty.

BOND_35_50.placeholder: The bond description for a close friend (bond level 35-50).

default.script: You regard {{other}} as a close friend. You deeply care for their well-being and are committed to supporting them, often putting their needs alongside your own.

BOND_50_100.placeholder: The bond description for a cherished companion (bond level 50-100).

default.script: You see {{other}} as a cherished companion. Your bond is strong and enduring, and you would do a great deal to ensure their happiness and safety, feeling a profound connection.

BOND_-10_0.placeholder: The bond description for mild suspicion (bond level -10 to 0).

default.script: You view {{other}} with suspicion. You are wary of their intentions and prefer to keep your distance, unsure if they can be trusted.

BOND_-20_-10.placeholder: The bond description for an unwelcome presence (bond level -20 to -10).

default.script: You see {{other}} as an unwelcome presence. You are uncomfortable around them and would rather avoid interaction, feeling a desire to distance yourself.

BOND_-35_-20.placeholder: The bond description for a troublesome individual (bond level -35 to -20).

default.script: You consider {{other}} a troublesome individual. Their actions often frustrate you, and you find it difficult to tolerate their presence, leading to frequent tension.

BOND_-50_-35.placeholder: The bond description for an adversary (bond level -50 to -35).

default.script: You regard {{other}} as an adversary. You actively dislike them and may go out of your way to oppose them, feeling a deep-seated animosity.

BOND_-100_-50.placeholder: The bond description for a sworn enemy (bond level -100 to -50).

default.script: You see {{other}} as a sworn enemy. Your hatred for them is intense, and you feel a relentless drive to keep them out of your life.

BOND_INCREASE_QUESTION_1.placeholder: Question to evaluate if the bond should increase (kindness/respect).

default.script: Has {{other}} been kind and respectful towards {{char}}?

BOND_INCREASE_QUESTION_2.placeholder: Question to evaluate if the bond should increase (helpfulness/consideration).

default.script: Has {{other}} helped {{char}} or shown consideration for their feelings?

BOND_INCREASE_QUESTION_3.placeholder: Question to evaluate if the bond should increase (quality time/engagement).

default.script: Has {{other}} spent quality time with {{char}} and engaged in meaningful interactions?

BOND_DECREASE_QUESTION_1.placeholder: Question to evaluate if the bond should decrease (rudeness/dismissiveness).

default.script: Has {{other}} been rude or dismissive towards {{char}}?

BOND_DECREASE_QUESTION_2.placeholder: Question to evaluate if the bond should decrease (neglect/disregard).

default.script: Has {{other}} neglected {{char}}'s needs or disregarded their feelings?

BOND_DECREASE_QUESTION_3.placeholder: Question to evaluate if the bond should decrease (harm/distress).

default.script: Has {{other}} caused harm or distress to {{char}}, either intentionally or unintentionally?
